leadText: Air Slash (Japanese: エアスラッシュ Air Slash) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation IV. It was TM95 in Pokémon Sword and Shield, and is TM065 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation IV 1.2 Generation V 1.3 Generation VI onwards 1.4 Generation VIII 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.5 Generation IX 1.5.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Air Slash inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of causing the target to flinch . It can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Air Slash has a PP of 20 in this generation. Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Air Slash is no longer affected by King's Rock . Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Air Slash's PP was reduced from 20 to 15. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Air Slash's PP has been reduced to 10. It also lowers the target's action speed . sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. It may also make the target flinch. LA The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. ZA The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make targets flinch.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It may also afflict the targeted enemy with the Cringe status condition, making its actions fail. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで ひるみじょうたいにして わざや こうげきを だせなくする MD GtI It damages an enemy. It could also cause the Cringe status condition, which makes the enemy unable to attack or use moves. S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It could also cause the enemy to flinch.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Despite its name and description, Air Slash is not a wind move . Air Slash originated as a TCG move .
